mastery_signal_examples.not_mastered: Learner cannot identify the key answer.

mastery_signal_examples.mastered: Learner completes the spoken task with limited support.
mastery_signal_examples.shaky: Learner completes part of the task but still needs prompting.
mastery_signal_examples.not_mastered: Learner cannot complete the task without full imitation.

knowledge_atoms.text: A story often has a setting, characters and a plot.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 一个故事通常有背景、人物和情节。

knowledge_atoms.text: Do you know the answers? Read the clues and complete the puzzle.
Now you are Peter. Call your friend and tell the story.
Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. Listen and fill in the blanks.
Peter's father is talking. He's happy.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 彼得的父亲正在交谈。他很开心。

knowledge_atoms.text: The man with the most beautiful flower can have my money!
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 拥有最美丽花朵的人可以得到我的钱！

knowledge_atoms.text: The seeds are bad and will never sprout!
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 种子是坏的，永远不会发芽！

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Visiting an old friend. Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. There is a central picture of Ken, surrounded by boxes to fill in his family members' jobs.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word visit?
Can you say: Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. Listen and fill in the blanks.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Peter's family. A crossword puzzle with clues about feelings and places.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word hospital?
Can you say: Do you know the answers? Read the clues and complete the puzzle.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Read and write - Story. A story about a rich businessman testing the honesty of three men using flower seeds.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word businessman?
Can you say: The man with the most beautiful flower can have my money!

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Read and write - Story Review. Peter is calling his friend to retell the story using the information from the chart.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Now you are Peter. Call your friend and tell the story.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. There is a central picture of Ken, surrounded by boxes to fill in his family members' jobs. Key patterns: Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. Listen and fill in the blanks.
core_patterns: Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. Listen and fill in the blanks.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word visit?
Can you say: Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. Listen and fill in the blanks.
return_anchors: Peter's family are going to visit Ken's family in another town. Peter's father is talking about them. Listen and fill in the blanks.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Portraits of Ken and his family members (mother, brother, sister, aunt, uncle). Students need to write down their hobbies based on the audio. Key patterns: He likes ...; She likes ...
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word hobbies?
Can you say: He likes ...

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice speaking activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Peter's family are on the bus. Family members are doing different activities and showing different emotions. Key patterns: Stop running! Sit down!; Peter's father is talking. He's happy.
core_patterns: Peter's father is talking. He's happy.
allowed_answer_scope: Peter's father is talking. He's happy.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word aunt?
Can you say: Stop running! Sit down!
return_anchors: Peter's father is talking. He's happy.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.

core_patterns: Do you know the answers? Read the clues and complete the puzzle.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word hospital?
Can you say: Do you know the answers? Read the clues and complete the puzzle.
return_anchors: Do you know the answers? Read the clues and complete the puzzle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A story about a rich businessman testing the honesty of three men using flower seeds. Key patterns: The man with the most beautiful flower can have my money!; The seeds are bad and will never sprout!
core_patterns: The man with the most beautiful flower can have my money!
The seeds are bad and will never sprout!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word businessman?
Can you say: The man with the most beautiful flower can have my money!
return_anchors: The man with the most beautiful flower can have my money!
The seeds are bad and will never sprout!

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A chart analyzing the elements of the story: setting, characters, and plot. Students need to fill in the blanks based on the story details and visual cues. Key patterns: A story often has a setting, characters and a plot.
core_patterns: A story often has a setting, characters and a plot.
allowed_answer_scope: The businessman, the factory worker, the coach, the fisherman
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word setting?
Can you say: A story often has a setting, characters and a plot.
return_anchors: A story often has a setting, characters and a plot.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Peter is calling his friend to retell the story using the information from the chart. Key patterns: Now you are Peter. Call your friend and tell the story.
